jerked-chicken-alfredo.name: Jerked Chicken Alfredo

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken breasts, or more to taste

instructions: Rub chicken breasts with about 3 tablespoons of jerk seasoning and refrigerate until ready to use.

Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion and peppers and saute until nearly tender, about 3 minutes. Combine Alfredo sauce with remaining 2 tablespoons jerk seasoning and 1 ounce pineapple juice. Stir mixture into the skillet, reduce heat to low, and let simmer.
In the meantime, fill a large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rolling boil. Add fettuccine to the pot of boiling water and cook until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Add garlic and pineapple chunks to the sauce. Increase heat and bring to a boil. Return heat to low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until flavors blend as desired.

Drain pasta and keep warm. Grill the chicken until the juices run clear, 5 to 7 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C). Slice into strips.
Plate the pasta and chicken and cover with the sauce.

jicama-and-pomegranate-slaw.name: Jicama And Pomegranate Slaw
instructions: Place the jicama, pomegranate seeds, onion, cilantro, and mint in a large salad bowl.
In a small bowl make the dressing by whisking together the olive oil, lime juice, pomegranate molasses, and salt.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss until the jicama is well coated. Chill for 20 minutes before serving.

juicy-baked-pork-chops-with-potatoes-and.name: Juicy Baked Pork Chops With Potatoes And Onion
juicy-baked-pork-chops-with-potatoes-and.original_name: Jugosas chuletas de cerdo al horno con papas y cebolla
instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 ° C.
Wash, dry and cut in half the potatoes, pits the onion and cut it into 4.
Reparte en una fuente de horno grande y mezcla con un chorro de aceite de oliva virgen extra.
Add garlic, mustard and cumin, peppery and remove well.
30-minute purple, move half the time and keep an eye on the oven so that you care that it doesn't get too dry, with oil or water added if necessary.
Cocina a fuego fuerte en una plancha con algo de aceite las chuletas por ambos lados, unos 3-4 minutos, hasta marcarlas con un tono dorado.
When you have spent half an hour in the oven, add half-lemon wine and juice, herbs and mix well.
Incorpora las chuletas de cerdo a la fuente, y  mezcla con los jugos del asado vegetal, salpimienta y agrega por encima la mitad del queso feta.
Bean about 10 more minutes, till the chops are at their best.
